patches.hypothesis: The original implementation had overfitting logic when handling Integer.MIN_VALUE values that was likely added to ensure the test suite passes rather than fixing the root logic. The refined fix correctly handles negative infinity values by adjusting the logic to consider them edge cases without arbitrary adjustments and by enforcing more general gcd computation principles.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug relates to negation of negative numbers which results in overflow. The solution is to handle Integer.MIN_VALUE cases separately where negation will cause overflow.
